sp_widget.name: Workspace Reservation Hero
sp_widget.template:
WORKSPACE RESERVATIONS MADE SIMPLE

Book a desk, room, or office in seconds.

Browse what's available, pick a date, and you're set. No back-and-forth emails, no waiting.

Browse Spaces Make a Reservation

{{c.total_spaces}}

Total Spaces

{{c.total_available_spaces}}

Available Now

{{c.workspace_type_count}}

Space Types

24/7

Access

What we offer

Different spaces for different needs

{{space.workspace_type_name}}

{{space.total}} workspaces are of the {{space.workspace_type_name}} type in total

{{space.available}} available
No workspace found.

How it works

Three steps, no hassle

1

Pick a space

Browse available desks, rooms, and offices. Filter by type or capacity.

2

Choose your slot

Select a date, time, and how long you need it. See what's free in real time.

3

Show up

Get a confirmation, then walk in and start working. That's it.
